features: Scheduled Queue now recognizes scheduled patrol, recurring patrol, vacation watch, future-dated, and locally submitted schedule metadata
Client scheduled/recurring/vacation requests are remembered locally after submit so they appear in Scheduled Queue even if the backend RPC falls back to older arguments
Scheduled Queue date logic now uses next_run, scheduled_for, schedule_start_date, start_date, requested_for, scheduled_at, or created_at in order
All Scheduled tab is restored and remains visible by wrapping tabs instead of horizontal scrolling
Removed ugly white native horizontal scrollbars from tab/table areas
Filter row now wraps cleanly and prevents clipped dropdown text
Table grid was tightened to fit the command-center page without a horizontal scrollbar
Right rail auto-selects the first schedule when schedule data exists
